hero.name: Jonah
hero.subtitle: AI Applications / Data Analysis Engineer
hero.tagline: Experienced in sales analytics, customer segmentation, and AI-powered solutions. Bridging data analysis with LLM applications to deliver production-ready systems.

about.label: About
about.title: Who I Am
about.p1: Data Analyst with 1.5 years of AI application development and 2 years of data analysis experience, currently working in the manufacturing industry. I specialize in transforming raw business data into actionable insights and building AI-powered automation workflows.
about.p2: Proficient with Pandas/NumPy for end-to-end data processing, familiar with LLM APIs (Tongyi Qianwen, DeepSeek) and Dify for lightweight AI tasks, and capable of wrapping services with FastAPI and deploying with Docker.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Work History
bullets: Owned sales analytics: extracted data from SQL Server/Excel, cleaned with Pandas, delivered Power BI dashboards
Built Azure OpenAI knowledge-base Q&A for sales policies and product manuals (chunking, embedding, retrieval)
Designed Power Automate workflows for automated reporting and data syncing, saving ~15 hours/week
Collaborated with sales teams to clarify data requirements and explain analysis limitations

items.name: Document Classification & Entity Extraction with LLMs
bullets: Built Dify workflows calling Tongyi Qianwen to extract fields from sales contracts — ~90% accuracy
Used DeepSeek API for lead scoring (high/medium/low intent) to prioritize sales follow-ups
Integrated workflows into internal management portal for sales users
items.tech: Tech: Dify, Tongyi Qianwen API, DeepSeek API, FastAPI

items.name: RFM Customer Value Analysis
bullets: Cleaned ~50k sales orders (3 years): deduplication, 3σ outlier filtering, missing value imputation
Segmented customers into high-value, potential, and churn groups; delivered Excel reports
Created trend and contribution charts with Matplotlib/Seaborn

items.name: Regional Sales Forecasting (Regression)
bullets: Engineered time/lag features and built XGBoost regression model — MAPE ~18%
Exposed FastAPI endpoint for planners to query forecasts; provided feature-importance analysis

items.name: Data Pipeline & API Wrapping
bullets: Built reusable ETL templates for CSV/Excel cleaning; exposed cleaning logic via FastAPI
Containerized with Docker and validated endpoints with Postman
items.tech: Tech: Python, Pandas, FastAPI, Docker, Git

items.title: DeepSeek V3: Expanding the Frontier of Open-Source LLMs
items.description: DeepSeek released V3 with Mixture-of-Experts architecture, rivaling GPT-4 at a fraction of training cost. A milestone for open-source AI.

items.title: Dify: The Open-Source LLM App Development Platform
items.description: Dify provides visual workflow orchestration, RAG pipeline, and agent capabilities — enabling rapid prototyping of AI applications without deep ML expertise.

items.title: MCP Protocol: Standardizing LLM-Tool Interaction
items.description: Anthropic's Model Context Protocol is gaining traction as the universal interface between LLMs and external tools/data sources.

items.title: RAG 2.0: Agentic Retrieval with Self-Correction
items.description: New research shows agentic RAG systems with self-reflection loops reduce hallucination rates by 40% compared to standard retrieval.

items.title: Ollama: Running LLMs Locally with One Command
items.description: Ollama makes local LLM deployment trivial — supporting DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen and more. Essential for privacy-sensitive enterprise use cases.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Interested in working together? Reach out via email.

hero.name: Jonah
hero.subtitle: AI 应用 / 数据分析工程师
hero.tagline: 拥有销售分析、客户细分和 AI 驱动解决方案的经验。将数据分析与 LLM 应用相结合，交付生产级系统。

about.label: 关于
about.title: 我是谁
about.p1: 1.5 年 AI 应用开发经验和 2 年数据分析经验的数据分析师，目前在制造业工作。我专注于将原始业务数据转化为可操作的洞察，并构建 AI 驱动的自动化工作流。
about.p2: 熟练使用 Pandas/NumPy 进行端到端数据处理，熟悉 LLM API（通义千问、DeepSeek）和 Dify 平台进行轻量级 AI 任务开发，能够使用 FastAPI 封装服务并通过 Docker 部署。
about.educationVal: 南京理工大学 · 本科

experience.label: 经历
experience.title: 工作经历
experience.role: 数据分析师（AI 应用方向）
bullets: 负责销售分析：从 SQL Server/Excel 提取数据，使用 Pandas 清洗，交付 Power BI 仪表板
构建 Azure OpenAI 知识库问答系统，覆盖销售政策和产品手册（文档分块、向量嵌入、检索）
设计 Power Automate 自动化工作流，实现报表自动生成和数据同步，每周节省约 15 小时
与销售团队协作，明确数据需求并解释分析局限性

items.name: 基于 LLM 的文档分类与实体抽取
bullets: 构建 Dify 工作流，调用通义千问从销售合同中提取字段 — 准确率约 90%
使用 DeepSeek API 进行线索评分（高/中/低意向），优先安排销售跟进
将工作流集成到内部管理平台，供销售团队使用
items.tech: 技术栈: Dify, 通义千问 API, DeepSeek API, FastAPI

items.name: RFM 客户价值分析
bullets: 清洗约 5 万条销售订单（3 年数据）：去重、3σ 异常值过滤、缺失值填补
将客户分为高价值、潜力和流失群体；交付 Excel 分析报告
使用 Matplotlib/Seaborn 创建趋势图和贡献度图表
items.tech: 技术栈: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, SQL

items.name: 区域销售预测（回归模型）
bullets: 构建时间/滞后特征，建立 XGBoost 回归模型 — MAPE ~18%
通过 FastAPI 暴露预测接口供计划人员查询；提供特征重要性分析
items.tech: 技术栈: Pandas, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, FastAPI

items.name: 数据管道与 API 封装
bullets: 构建可复用的 CSV/Excel 清洗 ETL 模板；通过 FastAPI 暴露数据清洗接口
使用 Docker 容器化部署，Postman 验证接口
items.tech: 技术栈: Python, Pandas, FastAPI, Docker, Git

items.title: DeepSeek V3：开源大模型的新标杆
items.description: DeepSeek 发布 V3，采用 MoE 混合专家架构，性能比肩 GPT-4，训练成本仅为几分之一。开源 AI 的里程碑事件。

items.title: Dify：开源 LLM 应用开发平台
items.description: Dify 提供可视化工作流编排、RAG 管道和 Agent 能力，无需深厚 ML 背景即可快速构建 AI 应用原型。

items.title: MCP 协议：标准化 LLM 与工具的交互
items.description: Anthropic 推出的模型上下文协议（MCP）正成为 LLM 与外部工具/数据源交互的通用接口标准。

items.title: RAG 2.0：带自我纠错的智能检索
items.description: 最新研究表明，带有自我反思循环的 Agentic RAG 系统相比标准检索，幻觉率降低 40%。

items.title: Ollama：一键本地运行大模型
items.description: Ollama 让本地部署 LLM 变得极其简单，支持 DeepSeek、Llama、Qwen 等主流模型，适合隐私敏感的企业场景。
